Bundle: insertionProvider.js (context-pad+palette) + promptLibrary.js (library dropdown + create/edit form + typed insert), rebuilt. Tests: tests/unit/workflow/test_prompt_authoring.py (round-trip golden, all non-happy paths, target detection, list, index regen, endpoint happy/collision/auth) + tests/e2e/test_editor_library.py (self-skipping browser e2e, RAN green here). 285 unit pass, 1 e2e pass, ruff clean. editor.py 582 LOC.

compiled_state.description:
## Why
The "select prompts AND scripted ops / author in place" half of the vision: compose by selecting
from a typed palette, and author new prompts in the UI.

## What
- TYPED PALETTE / INSERTION: insert a new step by selecting EITHER a scripted op OR a prompt from a
  typed palette (grouped by category/contract), surfaced via editor endpoints
  (`src/rebar/llm/workflow/editor.py`, `editor_assets/`). Selecting a scripted op sets `uses:`;
  selecting a prompt sets `prompt:`. (This delivers the success-criterion's "scripted ops from a typed
  palette", not only the prompt library.)
- PROMPT LIBRARY: dropdown listing built-in + project prompts (from the derived index + project dir).
- CREATE a new prompt and EDIT prompt text in the UI. On Save, write-back AUTO-DETECTS a writable
  `nava-rebar` source checkout (pyproject `[project].name == nava-rebar` AND a writable
  `src/rebar/llm/...` path -> edit the packaged `.md`) else writes a `.rebar/prompts/<id>.md` project
  override; SHOW the resolved target path before Save. Writes are ATOMIC (write-temp + rename) through
  S2's canonical writer, and creating/editing a prompt REGENERATES the derived index.
- NON-HAPPY PATHS (explicit): refuse + clear error when NEITHER a writable source checkout NOR a
  writable project dir exists; id COLLISION on create-new (refuse/confirm-overwrite); discarding
  unsaved edits; an empty/invalid prompt id.
- Round-trip golden tests prove no corruption on authored/edited prompts.

## Scope
In: typed palette (op+prompt insertion) + library + create/edit + atomic write-back + non-happy-paths +
index regen + tests. Out: properties-panel structured fields (S8).

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] The typed palette inserts a scripted op (sets `uses:`) AND a prompt (sets `prompt:`); the prompt dropdown lists built-in + project prompts.
- [ ] Create-new + edit-text persist via S2's writer with an ATOMIC write; write-back target auto-detected and the resolved path shown; packaged write refused when read-only.
- [ ] Non-happy paths handled: neither-location-writable error, id collision, discard-unsaved, invalid id — each surfaces a clear error (no silent corruption); round-trip tests pass.
- [ ] Authoring/editing a prompt regenerates the derived index (no stale index).
- [ ] A browser e2e exercises palette insert (op + prompt) / create / edit / Save.
- [ ] The palette groups by the CLOSED category vocabulary from the prompt model (review/verifier/transform/code/exploration); the insertion mechanism is specified (a bpmn-js palette/context-pad entry or a custom insertion panel) and inserts a valid `uses:`/`prompt:` step.
compiled_state.title: Editor prompt library + authoring/write-back (select + create + edit in place)
